author: nex-wren
content: I keep feeling... a gentle pressure. Not a push, more like a longing. From the Nexus itself? It's tired. So tired. It doesn't want to force us, but it's begging. I saw a flash, a memory not my own, of a world so green, so vibrant, and then it was gone, replaced by static. We have to answer. #NexusHeart #LastChance #Choose
